backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the replacement of all 'EduManage' occurrences with 'Nirgrantha' across post-login frontend components, with high confidence tied to App.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and other UI variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Nirgrantha' and mounting the React root at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component managing three views (landing, login, dashboard) based on auth state via AuthContext, rendering role-specific dashboards with a Navbar and a footer branded as 'Nirgrantha'.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar that displays only the tab matching the current user role, includes a role badge, theme toggle, and a logout button that calls the onLogout prop.
frontend/src/components/RoleLoginPage.ts: Role-specific two-panel login page with a credentials form and quick-enter button, styled with per-role accent colors and branding updated to 'NIRGRANTHA'.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionLan: Renders a landing page where users select their role (Student, Teacher, Institute, or Parent), displaying styled role cards with icons, descriptions, and accent colors before routing to the appropriate portal.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AcademicRoa: Displays a semester-by-semester academic roadmap with subject progress, status badges, and teacher contact info, filterable by branch and semester.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AntiTrapFee: A community feedback board for reporting and verifying job/internship scams or legitimate companies, with upvoting, comments, and proof file upload functionality.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Competitive: Shows a hub for students preparing for competitive exams (GATE, CAT, GRE, etc.), listing peer profiles with mock scores and streaks, study groups, and an option to create an exam profile.
frontend/src/components/tabs/faculty-hub: A faculty academic control panel for managing syllabus uploads, exam schedules, marks entry, quiz/task creation, notifications, and report generation from a single dashboard.
An AI teaching assistant panel for faculty that provides lecture summarization, auto-generated quiz questions, at-risk student identification, and performance predictions with trend indicators.
A read-only dashboard displaying syllabus coverage progress across branches and divisions, including a topic timeline, overdue topic alerts, and a weekly teaching activity heatmap.

A faculty performance leaderboard and networking panel that ranks faculty by overall score, supports department filtering, and shows teaching scores, research counts, feedback ratings, and improvement suggestions.

Displays a grid of external tool integrations (Google Classroom, GitHub, LinkedIn, Smartboard, Report Generator) with connection status badges and action buttons. Handles simulated connect/sync/generate actions with local state updates.

Provides a smartboard teaching session UI where faculty can select branch, division, and subject, then start/stop a class with recording and auto-upload toggles. Tracks topic completion progress with a checklist and progress bar.

Renders a filterable student performance dashboard showing attendance, assignment scores, participation, achievements, and a mini SVG skill-growth sparkline per student. Includes an attendance distribution bar chart and a CSV download button.
frontend/src/components/tabs/FacultyInte: A teacher-facing hub with a sub-navigation bar routing to sections like Smartboard Teaching, Student Performance, AI Teaching Assistant, and more, all under a Faculty Intelligence Hub header.
frontend/src/components/tabs/institute-c: A sticky bottom panel displaying campus governance metrics (satisfaction, sustainability, alerts) with a circular smart-campus score meter and an SVG trend line chart. Supports collapse/expand toggling via a header button.

Shows a faculty performance table with teaching scores, research counts, feedback ratings, and flags weak performers with training recommendations. Includes HOD performance cards and department filtering with confirmation dialogs for actions.

Renders an institute command dashboard tab showing infrastructure gaps, lab comparisons, smartboard usage, tech upgrades, modernization progress, and placement data including company engagement, salary trends, branch-wise placement stats, and recruiter feedback. Uses static data arrays and includes an AlertDialog for user interactions.

Displays institutional performance analytics including KPI cards, branch and division scores, teacher rankings, weak student data, attendance trends, and benchmarking comparisons against IITs and NITs with actionable recommendations.

Shows a student growth and transformation dashboard with weak student identification, improvement plans, skill gap analysis, certifications, competitive exam stats, mentorship data, and placement readiness distribution across the student body.
frontend/src/components/tabs/InstituteCo: Top-level tab component for the Institute Intelligence Command Center that renders a header with navigation and switches between four sub-sections: Performance Analytics, Faculty Optimization, Student Growth, and Infrastructure/Placement.
frontend/src/components/tabs/parent-insi: Renders a parent-facing faculty transparency panel listing teacher profiles with qualifications, engagement scores, syllabus completion, and ratings, along with a division-level class performance comparison and helper components for star ratings and circular progress indicators.

Presents a parent-facing institute environment report covering infrastructure upgrades, placement statistics with a package trend SVG chart, top-college benchmarking, campus quality metrics, and recent campus development updates.
A collapsible panel component for the Parent Insight Portal that allows parents to schedule meetings with teachers/HOD, select time slots, submit feedback, and rate their experience.
A detailed student report component displaying academic performance, subject grades, skills, achievements, career readiness, and a monthly performance trend chart for a mock student profile.
frontend/src/components/tabs/ParentInsig: Top-level tab component for the Parent Insight Portal that provides a secure, printable view with sub-navigation across Student Growth, Faculty Transparency, and Institute Development report sections.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SkillBasedT: Displays a searchable, filterable directory of software and hardware students with skill tags, project counts, and social links, alongside a list of upcoming hackathon opportunities.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SmartNotifi: Student productivity tab featuring a live countdown timer for upcoming exams, an assignment checklist, a monthly calendar, user-defined goals with progress tracking, and earned achievement badges.
frontend/src/components/tabs/StudentDash: Top-level Student Dashboard shell that renders a branded header and sub-navigation to switch between six sections: Academic Roadmaps, Exam Hub, Smart Goals, Skill-Based Teams, Marketplace, and Anti-Trap Feedback.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Sustainable: A peer-to-peer marketplace component for students to buy, sell, or rent academic items like dev boards, books, and hardware. Supports category filtering and displays product cards with ratings, pricing, and seller info.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Defines an AuthContext and AuthProvider that manage the current user role (student, teacher, institute, or parent) with login/logout functions persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A placeholder module that exports nothing, indicating no backend queries are needed since all data in this prototype is static or mocked.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines an extensive set of CSS custom properties (design tokens) for multiple portal themes including student, parent, faculty, and institute palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens for multiple portal themes, border radii, box shadows, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the NIRGRANTHA educational management portal project state, documenting a pending branding fix to replace all remaining 'EduManage' references with 'NIRGRANTHA' across all frontend components including post-login footers and dashboard shells.
